description_long: This object is a packaged steak, specifically labeled as 'Miolo de Alcatra' and weighing 500 grams, presented in a black plastic tray with a fitted black and gold label. The steak itself is a deep red color with visible white fat marbling, indicating freshness and quality. The packaging is sleek and modern, with the label covering the central portion of the steak and featuring bold gold lettering and branding. The tray is shallow and rectangular, designed to securely hold the steak and prevent leakage. The steak appears raw, with a moist surface and a natural, slightly irregular shape. No additional garnishes or decorative elements are present, and the focus is entirely on the steak and its packaging.
description: A raw, marbled steak labeled 'Miolo de Alcatra' is packaged in a sleek black tray with a gold-accented label, highlighting its freshness and quality.
description_view_0: Front view shows the steak centered in a black tray, with the gold-lettered label prominently displaying the product name and weight.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the steak and the snug fit of the label around the tray, with the marbling and texture of the meat visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the label and the steak's shape, with the label text partially visible and the tray's edges framing the meat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the steak's end and the continuation of the label, with the marbling and tray contours clearly seen.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak; the surface appears raw and unmarred.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with the marbling distributed fairly evenly throughout the steak.
